name: Immune rejuvenation surveillance pass for May 30, 2026

scope.question: Does the current public track summary understate how legible immune functional endpoints are compared with other hallmarks?

summary: The pass found enough signal to strengthen the public summary, but not enough to justify a stage move.
notes: The resulting bundle was about public legibility, not a stronger anti-aging claim.
Immune-functional endpoints stayed easier to read than many neighboring hallmark tracks.
next_actions: Review downstream pages if the stronger summary changes shared framing.
Keep future updates focused on whether functional legibility translates into stronger aging relevance.
